intro.title: What is Home Stay?
intro.description: Home Stay is a short-term rental management platform that helps property owners and managers organize and administer vacation rental properties.

about.title: 1. About This Privacy Policy
about.text: This Privacy Policy describes how Home Stay collects, uses, and protects user information. By using the platform, you agree to the terms described herein.

dataCollected.title: 2. Data We Collect
dataCollected.subtitle: We collect data to provide essential features:
dataCollected.emailDesc: Authentication, account creation, password recovery, account communications.
dataCollected.propertiesDesc: Property management, reservations, check-in/out dates, and platform operations.
dataCollected.billingDesc: Payment processing via Stripe — we do not store card data on our servers.
dataCollected.usageDesc: Diagnostics, security, and continuous platform improvement.
dataCollected.technicalDesc: Browser type, operating system, and approximate location for compatibility and security.

usage.title: 3. How We Use Data
usage.service: Provide the service: property, reservation, and financial management
usage.notifications: Notifications about your account, reservations, and important events

sharing.title: 4. Data Sharing
sharing.subtitle: We share data with the following services:
sharing.authorities: Legal authorities — when required by law
sharing.noSell: We never sell your personal data.

security.title: 5. Data Security
security.https: HTTPS/TLS encryption for data in transit
security.aes: AES-256 encryption for sensitive data at rest
security.rls: Row-Level Security — each organization accesses only its own data
security.audit: Access auditing and suspicious activity monitoring

retention.title: 6. Data Retention
retention.text: We retain data while your account is active. After cancellation:
retention.legal: Tax data retained as required by law

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.subtitle: You have the right to:
rights.access: Access: request a copy of all your data
rights.erasure: Erasure: request deletion of your data
rights.portability: Portability: receive data in a transferable format
rights.restriction: Restriction: limit processing of your data
rights.objection: Objection: object to processing for specific purposes

regional.title: 8. Regional Information — CCPA (California, USA)
regional.controller: Service provider: Home Stay, Portugal (international operations)
regional.basis: Under the CCPA, California residents have the right to know what personal information is collected and to request its deletion.
regional.authority: We do not sell personal information as defined by the CCPA.

cookies.title: 9. Cookies
cookies.text: We use essential cookies (functionality) and analytics cookies (Google Analytics, with consent). You can manage your preferences at any time via the cookie banner or in Settings.

changes.title: 10. Changes to This Policy
changes.text: We may update this policy periodically. We will notify you by email of significant changes at least 15 days in advance.

contact.title: 11. Contact
contact.complaint: For complaints: contact your local data protection authority.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.text: By accessing or using the Home Stay platform, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, you should not use the platform.

description.title: 2. Service Description
description.text: Home Stay is a short-term rental management platform that allows you to manage properties, reservations, expenses, owners, and calendar synchronization.

account.title: 3. Account and Access
account.item1: An account is required to use the platform
account.item2: You are responsible for maintaining credential confidentiality
account.item3: You must notify us immediately of unauthorized access
account.item4: An account can have multiple users with different access levels

subscription.title: 4. Subscription and Payment
subscription.item4: You can cancel anytime — access continues until the end of the period

acceptable.title: 5. Acceptable Use
acceptable.subtitle: You agree not to use the platform for:
acceptable.item4: Attempting to access other organizations' data

dataOwnership.title: 6. Data Ownership
dataOwnership.text: Data you enter is your property. You grant Home Stay a limited license to process it solely for the purpose of providing the service. You can export or request deletion of your data at any time.

availability.title: 7. Availability
availability.text: We strive to keep the platform available but do not guarantee uninterrupted availability. We are not responsible for losses resulting from unavailability.

liability.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
liability.text: Home Stay is provided "as is." We are not responsible for indirect damages. Maximum liability is limited to amounts paid in the last 3 months.

changes.title: 9. Changes to Terms
changes.text: We may update these terms periodically. We will notify you at least 15 days in advance of significant changes.

termination.title: 10. Termination
termination.text: We may suspend accounts that violate these terms. After termination, data is available for export for 30 days.

law.title: 11. Governing Law
law.text: These terms are governed by the laws applicable to your jurisdiction. For EU residents, GDPR provisions apply.

consent.acceptTerms: I have read and accept the
consent.required: You must accept the terms to continue
